title: 12 Pcs Indoor Cat Toys - Plush Catnip, Teeth Cleaning, Interactive Feather Teaser Wand, Spring Toy for Kittens
features: 【BEST VALUE 12 Pcs CAT TOY SET】Speedy Panther Cat Toy Set contains 1 * feather teaser wand toy, 3 * plush catnip toy, 2 * cat bell ball toy, 2 * cat spring toy, 2 * sound paper balls, 2 * cat spring tube, Suitable for cat playing scratch and chewing, attract cats attention and prevent from damaging the furniture.

【BUSY CATS, HEALTHY CATS】This interactive cat toy set provides hours of exercise and self-amusement. Various cat toys keep your cats busy when you are away, help kittens develop and coordinate their bodies. To release cats energy, stabilize nervous mood, increase exercise to lose weight and stay healthy.

【IMPROVE RELATIONSHIP WITH CATS】Whether you are having a kitten or an older cat, our interactive cat toys can improve the interaction between you and cats. With the fun cat feather toy and spring toy you can play with cats and build trust and camaraderie between you and your cats.

【HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL】The kitten toys set is made of non-toxic materials, high quality ABS, plush, feather and polyester, doesn't harm cats. This cat catnip toy is made of more durable cotton linen, stuffed with soft PP cotton and natural catnip, cats will always love to play with this cat toy set.

【BEST GIFT FOR CATS】 This interactive cat toy set meets all of the needs of various cats. Get healthy while playing, plush catnip toys also are cat chew toys, exfoliate dental plaque build-ups on their teeth to improve dental health during playing. It's the best Christmas and birthday present for your cats and all cat lovers.
